ddls:
CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "legislator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislator who cast the vote */,
  "motion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the motion being voted on */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote cast (e.g., YES, NO, Present/Not Voting) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was cast */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislative session during which the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_motion_id FOREIGN KEY ("motion_id") REFERENCES motions ("motion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_legislator_id FOREIGN KEY ("legislator_id") REFERENCES legislators ("legislator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislators" (
  "legislator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the legislator */,
  "chamber" TEXT /* Chamber the legislator belongs to */,
  "committee" TEXT /* Committee(s) the legislator serves on */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the legislator */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Political party of the legislator */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or region the legislator represents */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Date the legislator's term began */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* Date the legislator's term ends */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the legislator's official photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislators_committee FOREIGN KEY ("committee") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motions" (
  "motion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislative session */,
  "motion_title" TEXT /* Title or description of the motion */,
  "motion_date" TEXT /* Date when the motion was proposed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Outcome of the motion (e.g., PASSED, DID NOT PASS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the motion */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of motion */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject matter of the motion */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislator who sponsored the motion */,
  "co_sponsor_ids" TEXT /* List of IDs of legislators who co-sponsored the motion */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the motion was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the motion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES motion_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES motion_subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motions_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES legislators ("legislator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislative session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "presiding_officer" TEXT /* Name of the presiding officer of the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the session (e.g., active, adjourned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "chamber" TEXT /* Chamber the committee belongs to */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose or function of the committee */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee chair */,
  "vice_chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee vice chair */,
  "members" TEXT /* List of IDs of committee members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_counts" (
  "vote_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote count */,
  "motion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the motion */,
  "yes_votes" INTEGER /* Number of YES votes */,
  "no_votes" INTEGER /* Number of NO votes */,
  "present_votes" INTEGER /* Number of Present/Not Voting */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "abstain_votes" INTEGER /* Number of abstain votes */,
  "absent_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absent votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_counts_motion_id FOREIGN KEY ("motion_id") REFERENCES motions ("motion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amendments" (
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amendment */,
  "motion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the motion the amendment is proposed to */,
  "amendment_title" TEXT /* Title or description of the amendment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the amendment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the amendment (e.g., Agreed, Rejected) */,
  "proposed_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legislator who proposed the amendment */,
  "co_proposer_ids" TEXT /* List of IDs of legislators who co-proposed the amendment */,
  "proposed_date" TEXT /* Date when the amendment was proposed */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the amendment was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the amendment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amendments_proposed_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposed_by_id") REFERENCES legislators ("legislator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amendments_motion_id FOREIGN KEY ("motion_id") REFERENCES motions ("motion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amendments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the motion type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the motion type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject matter */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject matter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject matter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., citizen, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "motion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_motion_id FOREIGN KEY ("motion_id") REFERENCES motions ("motion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
